author: geunhwan
title: smoke_ConvertCPULayerTest - primType is unexpected : unknown_i32 Expected : acl_i32
signature: primType is unexpected : unknown_i32 Expected : acl_i32|Code Issue

failed_jobs.name: CPU functional tests / CPU functional tests
failed_jobs.symptom: smoke_ConvertCPULayerTest assertion failed: primType is unexpected : unknown_i32 Expected : acl_i32

key_errors:
Value of: primTypeCheck(primType)
  Actual: false
Expected: true
primType is unexpected : unknown_i32 Expected : acl_i32
root_cause: The CPU functional test smoke_ConvertCPULayerTest_4D_Dynamic expects the ACL (ARM Compute Library) backend to handle i32-to-i8 Convert operations with primitive type 'acl_i32', but the runtime returns 'unknown_i32'. This indicates that the ACL-based Convert kernel is not being selected for the i32 input type, possibly because the ACL plugin's type support or kernel selection logic does not include i32 as a supported input type for the Convert operation on this ARM64 cross-compiled build. The PR (#36888) is a revert of a GPU-related change (#36504), and the failing test is specific to CPU/ARM ACL; this may be a pre-existing issue surfacing in the merge queue or a regression from the revert.
reproduction_steps: Run ov_cpu_func_tests on ARM64 with filter: --gtest_filter=smoke_ConvertCPULayerTest_4D_Dynamic/ConvertCPULayerTest.CompareWithRefs/*inputPRC=i32*primitive=acl*
recommended_actions: Investigate ACL Convert kernel type support: check if i32 is listed as a supported input type for ACL Convert in src/plugins/intel_cpu/src/nodes/convert.cpp or equivalent ACL dispatch code
Check if the issue is pre-existing by running the same test on the current releases/2026/3 base without this PR
If pre-existing, add the test to the expected_failures_OP.csv for ARM64/ACL or fix the ACL kernel to support i32
If introduced by the revert, identify what code in PR #36504 enabled ACL i32 support for Convert and ensure it is preserved
prevention_strategies: Add a CI gate that validates ACL primitive type coverage for all supported input types in ConvertCPULayerTest before merging changes to the CPU plugin or related GPU/CPU shared code.
historical_context: No prior occurrences of this exact failure pattern in the investigation database.
